title: Oliver Beer: the artist who makes ancient cave paintings sing
An ancient whale graveyard in the Indian Ocean teems with life
description: NEW YORK (AP) — Scientists have unearthed communities of marine life — including jellyfish, tubeworms and brittle stars — thriving on a millions-year-old whale graveyard.
